queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the association between the absence of a checking account and a reduction in credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Investigation into the influence of negative checking account balances on decreased probability of credit default.

queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: less than 1 year.
queries.question: Determinants of credit risk escalation associated with employment duration of less than one year.
